e3670113cc82c6accce8dd3d2bf255af1a08a037 (master HEAD, 2026-05-21)

# Why a commit SHA and not a tag:
#
# wolfSSL/go-wolfssl has no release tags as of 2026-05-21; the only
# branches are master and a series of devin/* work-in-progress
# refactors. CLAUDE.md rule #11 says to pin the latest tag of any
# wolfSSL project we vendor; in the absence of tags we pin master
# HEAD by commit SHA and record it here so a fresh clone can verify
# the exact bytes a build was made against.
#
# Bump procedure: when a tagged release lands upstream, replace this
# file's first line with the tag name and update the submodule
# pointer in the same commit.
